name: clinic administrators processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For clinic administrators processing 10-20 invoices/month, inefficient reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inefficient reconciliation of patient billing records with insurance payments.
features: manual data entry for patient billing records
